> RSA 2026 · Moscone Center · March 23-26

---

## Category
**Cluster:** Managed Detection and Response

---

## Product Brief
1. Arctic Wolf specializes in managed detection and response (MDR) solutions, offering 24/7 security monitoring and threat detection.
2. Their core offering is the Aurora Superintelligence Platform, a cloud-native, open XDR solution that leverages AI for broad visibility and efficient incident response.
3. The company provides a unique concierge security team model, acting as an extension of internal IT teams to deliver tailored response recommendations and ongoing support.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Arctic Wolf announced the launch of the Aurora Agentic SOC, described as the world's largest agentic Security Operations Center, delivering improved AI-driven security outcomes.
- They also debuted the Aurora Superintelligence Platform, built on a transformative agentic framework called the Swarm of Experts, designed to accelerate AI adoption in cybersecurity.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does the new Aurora Agentic SOC leverage AI to improve security outcomes and reduce complexity for organizations?
- [ ] What are the key differentiators of the Aurora Superintelligence Platform compared to other AI-driven security solutions in the market?
- [ ] Can you elaborate on the 'concierge security team' model and how it integrates with the new Aurora platform to provide 24/7 monitoring and response?
